title: senecio sardous
intro: Senecio sardous, also known as Groundsel, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Groundsel is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
